arguments.argument: with other { tEffect=instance_create(x,y,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfPongBulBreak; tEffect.image_speed=0.25; tEffect.image_blend=image_blend tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0 instance_destroy() } playSound(global.snd_MarioBlockBreak,0,0.94,26000+random(8000)) tEffect=instance_create(x,y,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfPongBulBreak; tEffect.image_speed=0.25; tEffect.image_blend=image_blend tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0 instance_destroy()
